# Pull Request

## Description
Brief description of changes.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change fixing an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change adding functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature causing existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Configuration contribution (adding optimal config to database)

## Related Issue
Fixes #(issue number)

## Changes Made
- Change 1
- Change 2
- Change 3

## Testing
How was this tested?

- [ ] Tested on single GPU
- [ ] Tested on multi-GPU
- [ ] Added unit tests
- [ ] Existing tests pass

## Hardware Tested On (if applicable)
- GPU:
- CUDA Version:
- vLLM Version:

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] Code commented where necessary
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] No new warnings generated
- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] All tests passing
- [ ] Black formatted (`black .`)
- [ ] Ruff checks pass (`ruff check .`)

## Screenshots (if applicable)
Add screenshots of results, outputs, etc.

## Additional Notes
Any other information relevant to the PR.
